hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|css|js|jsx)$' | xargs -I {} npx prettier --write "{}" 2>/dev/null || true

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); for p in .env package-lock.json pnpm-lock.yaml .git/; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]]; then echo "Geblokkeerd: $FILE matcht beschermd patroon $p" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0'
echo 'HERINNERING: logger uit @oranje-wit/types (NOOIT console.log) | rel_code is enige speler-sleutel | NOOIT pnpm db:push | Deploy: alleen via team-release | Taal: altijd Nederlands'

powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code heeft je aandacht nodig', 'Claude Code')"
